name: Concert Poster Carousel
aesthetic: Cinematic concert flyer — dark teal/navy background with artist portrait and moody overlay, oversized yellow brush-script headline with soft glow, rotated vertical side text, small plus/cross decorations, thin inner border frame, QR code. Slides 2-4 adapt the same dark+yellow language for restaurant spotlights tied to the venue. Feels like a tour poster stapled in a record-shop window.

fonts.brush_script: Kaushan Script / Pacifico (large yellow brush-script headline with glow)
fonts.display_thin: Inter 300/400 (vertical rotated side text, spaced letters)

slides.subject: Dark navy/teal bg with full-bleed artist/crowd photo behind a dark gradient overlay; thin inner border frame; top-left 'BITEMAP PRESENTS' place line; top-right small BiteMap logo; large yellow brush-script artist name (e.g. 'Shakira') center; left side rotated vertical 'BITEMAP PRESENTS'; right side rotated vertical concert date; small plus/cross sparkles scattered; footer row with door time, venue address, opener info, and a QR code.

copy.artistName: artist / tour name in brush script

slides.subject: Same dark cinematic language. Left half dish photo with teal overlay; right half has label 'BEFORE THE SHOW' in small caps, yellow brush-script dish/restaurant name, meta row (cuisine · walk-time to venue · rating), short review. Thin border frame, plus sparkles.

copy.label: 'BEFORE THE SHOW' fixed
copy.scriptName: restaurant or dish name in brush-script

slides.subject: Mirror of slide 2 — right half dish photo, left half label 'AFTER THE ENCORE' + yellow brush-script, meta row, review note. Emphasis on late-night / quick / nearby.

Dark bg with thin border; label 'THE SET LIST' top; numbered list (3-5 spots) each with pin number badge, restaurant name (bold), quick tag line (cuisine · distance), yellow accent divider between items; centered venue pin at bottom.

copy.label: 'THE SET LIST' fixed
copy.places: array of 3-5 {number, name, tagline} — tagline = 'Cuisine · 6 min walk'
copy.venueName: venue label for the bottom pin

slides.subject: Same dark cinematic frame; yellow brush-script 'found on BiteMap' centered; transparent BiteMap logo; app store badges; vertical 'BITEMAP PRESENTS' ticker on one side; QR code corner.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'found on' script / BiteMap logo / tagline 'real places · real reviews' / app badges

inputs_required.artistName: string — headliner / tour name (shown in brush script)
inputs_required.heroImageUrl: artist or crowd photo (hero slide bg)

copy_rules: Brush-script headlines are SHORT — 1 to 3 words. The script is the visual weight.
Never use generic hype ('legendary', 'unforgettable'). Name the artist / restaurant / dish literally.
Meta rows use `·` separator — keep to 3 items: cuisine · walk-time · rating
Walk times should be real (Google Maps), not invented. '6 MIN WALK', '2 BLOCKS', etc.
Tone: cinematic and specific — this is a tour flyer for food, not an ad
Never put the artist name in sales/hype language — it's the headliner, let it breathe
asset_rules: Hero photo: artist press shot or wide-angle crowd/stage photo — must survive heavy dark overlay
Restaurant photos: dark, moody shots work best (low light, candles, neon) — bright studio food fights the palette
Minimum 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
Always use `bitemap_logo_transparent.png` — never a logo with baked-in background
use_when: Concert or major show tied to a FIFA host city / BiteMap market
Reaction content when an artist announces / posts about food in a BiteMap city
Pre-show food picks for arena / stadium / festival audiences
Anytime a big event creates a pre/post-show food window within walking distance of known spots
